metadata.description: SQL Server migration analysis plugins — SSIS package analysis and DACPAC/BACPAC schema extraction

plugins.name: ssis-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze SSIS .dtsx packages — extract control flow, data flows, connections, variables, SQL, scripts, column lineage, and migration assessment.

plugins.name: dacpac-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze SQL Server .dacpac and .bacpac packages — extract tables, views, stored procedures, functions, constraints, indexes, schemas, and full database schema metadata.
